objects.query: SELECT StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2 WHERE StockKeepingUnit IN ('NS-STARTER', 'NS-PRO', 'NS-ENTERPRISE') ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC

SELECT Name, SellingModelType, Status FROM ProductSellingModel WHERE Id IN (SELECT ProductSellingModelId FROM ProductSellingModelOption WHERE Product2.StockKeepingUnit IN ('NS-STARTER', 'NS-PRO', 'NS-ENTERPRISE')) ORDER BY Name ASC, SellingModelType ASC
SELECT Name, IsActive, IsStandard FROM Pricebook2 WHERE IsStandard = true ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT Name, IsActive, IsDerived, Pricebook2Id, Product2Id, ProductSellingModelId, UnitPrice, Pricebook2.Name, Product2.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name FROM PricebookEntry WHERE Product2.StockKeepingUnit IN ('NS-STARTER', 'NS-PRO', 'NS-ENTERPRISE') AND Pricebook2.IsStandard = true AND IsActive = true ORDER BY Product2.StockKeepingUnit ASC, Pricebook2.Name ASC, ProductSellingModel.Name ASC

SELECT AdjustmentMethod, Description, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, IsActive, Name, Pricebook2Id, ScheduleType FROM PriceAdjustmentSchedule WHERE Id IN (SELECT PriceAdjustmentScheduleId FROM PriceAdjustmentTier WHERE Product2.StockKeepingUnit IN ('NS-STARTER', 'NS-PRO', 'NS-ENTERPRISE')) ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT AdjustmentType, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, LowerBound, PriceAdjustmentScheduleId, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, Product2Id, ProductSellingModelId, ScheduleType, SellingModelType, TierType, TierValue, UpperBound, PriceAdjustmentSchedule.Name, Product2.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name, ProductSellingModel.SellingModelType FROM PriceAdjustmentTier WHERE Product2.StockKeepingUnit IN ('NS-STARTER', 'NS-PRO', 'NS-ENTERPRISE') ORDER BY PriceAdjustmentSchedule.Name ASC, Product2.StockKeepingUnit ASC, ProductSellingModel.Name ASC, TierType ASC, TierValue ASC
